com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.barcodescanner

Class ScanParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.barcodescanner.ScanParameters

  • public class ScanParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    Parameters for hard scanning.

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      static int FOCUS_OFF

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getFocusMode()
      Gets scanner focus mode.
      ScannerType getScannerType()
      Gets the current scanner type.
      SurfaceView getSurfaceView()
      Gets the surface view for scanning.
      int getTimeout()
      Gets scanning timeout.
      boolean isSoundSwitcher()
      Gets whether to open buzzer when recognize the barcode or not.
      void setFocusMode(int focusMode)
      Sets scanner focus mode.
      void setScannerType(ScannerType scannerType)
      Sets the scanner type to be used.
      void setSoundSwitcher(boolean soundSwitcher)
      Sets whether to open buzzer when recognize the barcode or not.
      void setSurfaceView(SurfaceView surfaceView)
      Sets the surface view for scanning.
      void setTimeout(int timeout)
      Sets scanning timeout.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ScanParameters

        public ScanParameters()

    • Method Detail

      • getTimeout

        public int getTimeout()
        Gets scanning timeout.
        Returns:
        Scanning timeout.

      • setTimeout

        public void setTimeout(int timeout)
        Sets scanning timeout.
        Parameters:
        timeout - Scanning timeout, which shall be range from 1000 to 25400 ms

      • getFocusMode

        public int getFocusMode()
        Gets scanner focus mode.
        Returns:
        Scanner focus mode.

      • setFocusMode

        public void setFocusMode(int focusMode)
        Sets scanner focus mode. This parameter is temporarily useless.
        Parameters:
        focusMode - Scanner focus mode, which can ScanUtil.FOCUS_ON(2), ScanUtil.FOCUS_OFF(0) or ScanUtil.FOCUS_READING(1).

      • isSoundSwitcher

        public boolean isSoundSwitcher()
        Gets whether to open buzzer when recognize the barcode or not.
        Returns:
        Whether to open buzzer when recognize the barcode or not.

      • setSoundSwitcher

        public void setSoundSwitcher(boolean soundSwitcher)
        Sets whether to open buzzer when recognize the barcode or not.
        Parameters:
        soundSwitcher - Whether to open buzzer when recognize the barcode or not.

      • getScannerType

        public ScannerType getScannerType()
        Gets the current scanner type.
        Returns:
        Current scanner type. See ScannerType.

      • setScannerType

        public void setScannerType(ScannerType scannerType)
        Sets the scanner type to be used.
        Parameters:
        scannerType - Scanner type to be used. See ScannerType.

      • getSurfaceView

        public SurfaceView getSurfaceView()
        Gets the surface view for scanning.
        Returns:
        The surface view for scanning.

      • setSurfaceView

        public void setSurfaceView(SurfaceView surfaceView)
        Sets the surface view for scanning.
        Parameters:
        surfaceView -
